channel.title: Shell on My Linux Journey
channel.description: Recent content in Shell on My Linux Journey

item.title: Advanced ADB Shell Commands for Android Devices
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Advanced ADB shell commands for Android devices - both rooted and unrooted. Covers debugging, performance tuning, package control, logs, networking, and system inspection.

item.title: Advanced Terminal Tips and Tricks for Linux
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Advanced terminal tips for Linux power users. Learn bash shortcuts, aliases, functions, tmux, screen, autojump, and essential tools for productivity.

item.title: Advanced Terminal Tips and Tricks for Linux
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Advanced terminal tips for Linux power users. Learn bash shortcuts, aliases, functions, tmux, screen, autojump, and essential tools for productivity.
